title: Patatas Bravas Tempura
description: Crispy Japanese-inspired tempura battered Spanish potatoes in a spicy bravas sauce. A unique twist on a classic tapas dish.
instructions: Cut the patatas into 1-inch cubes and rinse under cold water.
In a large bowl, mix together mellow and spanish. Gradually add water, stirring until smooth.
Add patatas to the batter and toss until coated.
Heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat until 350°F.
Carefully add the battered patatas to the oil in batches and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the tempura from the oil and drain on paper towels.
Serve the tempura patatas hot with a side of bravas sauce for dipping.
Optional: garnish with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of mellow for added flavor.
